metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_1160
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The authors show by combination of immunoblotting with functional assay (glutamate release assay) that Botulinum neurotoxin C1 is able to cleave specifically membrane-bound syntaxin-1 and this leads to inhibition of neurotransmitter release.

4/9/2017 Pim
- Glutamate release from synaptosomal preparations measured with a photospectrometric assay.. Experimental description: Materials and Methods:
Preparation and incubation of subcellular fractions Synaptosomeswerepreparedasdescribedpreviouslybymeansofdiferential and Ficoll-gradient centrifugation (Fischer von Mollard etal., 1991; McMahonetal.,1992)

In addition, the fig. 1 and fig.2 legends.
